# Saverys of Broadway

> Luxury interior design studio established in 1991 in Broadway, Cotswolds. Hand upholstery workshop, premium fabrics showroom, bespoke furniture, and expert interior design service. Studios in Broadway (Worcestershire), Ludlow (Shropshire), and Chelsea (London).

Saverys creates luxurious, timeless interiors for private residences, country houses, and luxury hotels across the United Kingdom. The Broadway workshop is home to a team of expert craftspeople with over 50 years of combined experience in hand upholstery — a dying art that Saverys is dedicated to preserving. The showroom at the Cotswold Design Centre offers an unrivalled selection of premium fabrics, rugs, wallpapers, and finishes from the world's most prestigious textile houses.

Founded by Lyndsey Savery in 1991, the studio has grown from a single Cotswolds location to three studios spanning Broadway, Ludlow, and Chelsea, while maintaining the personal, consultative approach that has defined the practice from the beginning.

## Pages

- [Home](https://saverys.co.uk/): Overview of Saverys interior design services, portfolio highlights, and studio locations
- [About](https://saverys.co.uk/about): The story of Saverys from 1991 to today — founding, philosophy, and growth
- [Portfolio](https://saverys.co.uk/projects): Gallery of completed interior design projects across the UK
- [Workshop & Store](https://saverys.co.uk/workshop): The Broadway workshop, hand upholstery craft, showroom, premium fabrics, and rugs
- [Services](https://saverys.co.uk/services): Full interior design, fabric sourcing, furniture curation, colour consultation, and project management
- [Contact](https://saverys.co.uk/contact): Studio addresses, phone numbers, and enquiry form for Broadway, Ludlow, and Chelsea

## Locations

- Broadway: Cotswold Design Centre, Kennel Lane, Broadway, Worcestershire, WR12 7DJ — 01386 858941
- Ludlow: 1 Tower Street, Ludlow, Shropshire, SY8 1RL — 01584 708381
- Chelsea: Suite 9, 405 Kings Road, Chelsea, London — 020 3668 1000

## Services

- Residential interior design
- Hotel and hospitality interior design
- Hand upholstery and bespoke furniture
- Premium fabric sourcing and consultation
- Rug selection and supply
- Soft furnishings, curtains, and blinds
- Full project management from concept to installation
